title: mesosphaerum sideritis
intro: Mesosphaerum sideritis, also known as Brazilian peppertree or Brazilian pepper, is a flowering plant in the verbena family, native to South America but now widely invasive in Florida and other parts of the United States. The medicinal properties of mesosphaerum sideritis include its antibacterial and antifungal properties, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of this plant include treating various skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, and reducing fever and pain. Mesosphaerum sideritis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, and is also used as a natural insect repellent due to its pungent aroma.
